ai_suggestion: Welcome to a warm, sun-kissed day in Philly! To stay effortlessly chic and comfortable in this 31.9°C heat, opt for breathable fabrics like a linen button-down paired with tailored shorts, or a breezy cotton midi dress, and carry a light denim jacket for cool air-conditioned indoors. Do not leave the house without a stylish pair of polarized sunglasses and a high-SPF sunscreen to protect against the afternoon glare. Enjoy your outdoor errands today, keep a bottle of water handy, and let that gentle 13.3 km/h breeze keep you feeling fresh!
